findings.location: sections s2, s3, s4 — hints arrays
findings.description: The `pattern` attribute is missing from the hints of s2, s3, and s4. This attribute specifies the column name in CODE_PATTERN table to filter items, and is explicitly described in the source JSP comments: 「pattern属性には、使用するパターンのカラム名を指定する。」. It appears in all three tag code examples (`pattern="PATTERN2"`) and is a key attribute for codeSelectタグ, codeRadioButtonsタグ, and codeCheckboxesタグ.
findings.source_evidence: Source JSP comment (codeSelectタグ section): 「pattern属性には、使用するパターンのカラム名を指定する。」; code examples: `pattern="PATTERN2"` in all three tags.
